data.body: S5 leafy-vogue-ingot CLAIMED (plan-review PASS 0 findings). Prereqs verified LIVE: JoeOakhartNava in Administrators+feature-branch-drivers; recent changes 242-246 all MERGED with both LLM-Review(bot 1000002) AND Verified(CI bot 1000008) SATISFIED -> two-vote pipe healthy; bot S2-ready per handoff. No S5 driver exists yet -> building infra/gerrit/feature-branch-e2e.sh (HTTPS/REST based) reusing reviewbot-e2e.sh conventions. Plan: build driver (AC1), run 7 scenarios live capturing evidence, land script+evidence via Gerrit, close S5; then S6.
